title: Need More Bones
description: Adds Trailer Style (Bare Bones) textures for MANY mods currently used by Vault Hunters 3!
body:
I AM working on updating, but my situation is pretty much: work, gradschool, house, sleep repeat.
I'm going to reship the pack as a combo, ill gladly open other projects per-mod if requested!

Just updated for U19 compatibility!

This pack adds Trailer Style (Bare Bones) textures for The Vault, Quark, Every Compat (In progress), Sophisticated Backpacks, and Simple Storage Network!
End Goal: Make this pack complete for the **Vault Hunters 3 Modpack**!

I'll defer addons already made by others.

I checked release versions are backwards compatible from the other authors.

| MOD | Completion % |
|-------------------------: | :-----------------------------------------------|
| Architect's Palette | (Just started, priority vault blocks) |
| Applied Energistics 2 | COMING SOON(tm) |
| Auxiliary Blocks | 100% in Vaults |
| Bare Bones Vanilla | [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) |
| Decorative Blocks | 100% |
| Ecologics | 100% in Vaults/~80% total |
| Mekanism | COMING SOON(tm) |
| Modular Routers | 100% |
| Quark | ~80% |
| Refined Storage | HAS BROKEN TEXTURES [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-refined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-refined) |
| Simple Storage | 100% |
| Sophisticated Backpacks | 100% |
| Storage Drawers | Lock Symbol is broken [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-storage-drawers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-storage-drawers) |
| The Vault | Items: ~85%? |
| Create | [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-metals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-metals) |
| Waystones | [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-waypoints](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-waypoints) |

Priority: usable items in VH3.
